tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All measured laboratory values are within normal limits for this patient’s age, with no significant abnormalities detected. Glucose metabolism, renal function, electrolytes, and lipid profile are all well controlled. No acute or chronic laboratory concerns are evident at this time. Recommend continued routine monitoring.

text.div: Provider Organization: Detská fakultná nemocnica s poliklinikou Banská Bystrica
